candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; standard naming and appears as the primary revenue line.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Interest income on bank accounts and receivables
candidates.why: Interest income, part of financial income, not operating revenue.
Discontinued operations result, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Discontinued Operations - Tax Impacts - Current Income/Expense
candidates.why: Tax impact on discontinued operations, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet receivable; not revenue line.
Large operating cost but includes overhead; not clearly direct cost of sales.
Mixed operating overhead, not clearly direct COGS; also used as SG&A.
Selling/marketing cost; belongs in SG&A, not COGS.
Financing cost, not cost of goods sold.
Financing-related, not cost of goods sold.
Supplemental disclosure of rental expense; an operating overhead item, not explicit COGS.
Component of personnel/overhead; not clearly direct COGS-only.
Irregular operating/legal costs, not recurring direct cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Accrued expenses and other current liabilities
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability; not an income statement COGS line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. None of the COGS candidates is a clean direct cost-of-sales line; they are broad operating or overhead buckets. The row 'License costs' (outside the candidate list) appears to represent direct costs tied to providing licensed software/services and is the best proxy for COGS. Because this selection is outside the provided candidates and the classification between COGS vs SG&A is ambiguous for this SaaS-like company, manual review is recommended. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] License costs

candidates.why: Core overhead personnel costs; classic SG&A component.
General operating overhead; another key SG&A bucket, excluding D&A and interest.
Detailed component of personnel expenses; SG&A-type cost but appears as supplemental breakdown.
Additional personnel-related overhead; again a detailed SG&A component, supplemental.

variables.notes: Selected the main income-statement SG&A buckets rather than the supplemental breakdown rows to avoid double counting while capturing core operating overhead. Depreciation/amortization and balancing/total lines were deliberately excluded.

No research & development expense line (or close synonym) appears in the provided income statement. It is likely either not separately disclosed or embedded within other operating expenses; therefore XRD is set to 0 without manual review.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; net of capitalized interest and clearly labeled as such.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; a secondary form of interest expense.
Allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Synonym for non-controlling interests; not an interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; duplicates the main lease interest expense concept.
Balance sheet debt; not an income statement expense line.
Balance sheet debt; not an income statement expense line.
Equity line for NCI; not interest expense.
Equity line for NCI; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list: first general interest expense net of capitalized interest, then lease-related interest expense if needed for years where the first might be missing.

candidates.why: Component of equity, but not total equity attributable to parent; too narrow for BE.
Duplicate/variant label; again only a component of equity, not total parent equity.
Paid-in capital component; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Explicit book equity attributable to parent shareholders; correctly excludes non-controlling interests and matches BE definition.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; would cause double counting if MIB is added separately.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Chose the equity line explicitly attributable to equity holders of the parent to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE definition.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; a flow, not the balance sheet stock used in BE+MIB denominator.
Synonym for non-controlling interests on the income statement; again a flow, not the desired stock measure.
Balance sheet NCI line; appears to represent the same item as the plural form but labeled slightly differently.
Balance sheet non-controlling interests; stock of minority equity, which is exactly MIB for BE+MIB denominator.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet stock of non-controlling interests (equity), not the income statement flows, to align with the BE+MIB denominator definition.
